title: Professional Tax Registration Chennai | Virtual Auditor
description: Professional tax registration in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. PTRC and PTEC enrollment. Employer and employee professional tax compliance. Call +91-99622 60333.
bodyText:
Looking for professional tax registration in Chennai? Virtual Auditor handles complete professional tax compliance in Tamil Nadu — registration, monthly/half-yearly return filing, and payment for both employers (PTEC) and employees (PTRC). Led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA).

What is Professional Tax Registration Chennai | Virtual Auditor?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Professional Tax Enrollment Certificate (PTEC) for employers — registration with the Tamil Nadu Commercial Taxes Department. Professional Tax Registration Certificate (PTRC) for employer TDS on employee salaries. Monthly/half-yearly professional tax return filing based on applicable frequency. Professional tax computation for all employees based on Tamil Nadu slab rates. Payment challan preparation and timely deposit. Annual reconciliation and compliance review. Integration with payroll processing for seamless PT deduction.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for Professional Tax in Chennai
  Professional tax in Tamil Nadu applies to all salaried employees and self-employed professionals. Employers must deduct PT from employee salaries and remit to the Commercial Taxes Department. Non-compliance attracts penalties and interest. Virtual Auditor integrates PT compliance with your payroll process — ensuring correct slab application, timely deduction, and on-time return filing. Tamil Nadu professional tax rate: Rs 2,500 per annum for employees with monthly salary above Rs 21,000 (highest slab). We handle both new registrations and ongoing compliance.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Registration — PTEC and PTRC application with Commercial Taxes Department. Step 2: Employee PT computation based on salary slabs. Step 3: Monthly deduction from payroll and challan deposit. Step 4: Return filing within prescribed timelines. Step 5: Annual reconciliation and compliance certificate.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Need professional tax registration in Chennai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-99622 60333
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: G-131, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai, Chennai 600002

Virtual Auditor handles company incorporation and related registrations through the MCA portal. Our process is fully digital, using SPICe+ (INC-32), AGILE-PRO, and other integrated forms for seamless registration.

The incorporation process covers: name reservation (RUN/SPICe+ Part A), DIN application for directors, DSC procurement, drafting of MOA and AOA, SPICe+ form filing, PAN/TAN allotment, GST registration, EPFO/ESIC registration (where applicable), and professional tax registration. Post-incorporation, we assist with statutory register maintenance, board resolutions, and annual compliance setup.

Our team has incorporated 500+ companies across diverse sectors. We serve entrepreneurs and businesses in Chennai, Bangalore, Mumbai, and across India with end-to-end incorporation support.

faqs.q: What is the professional tax rate in Tamil Nadu?
faqs.a: Tamil Nadu professional tax maximum is Rs 2,500 per annum. Monthly deduction: Rs 208 (salary above Rs 21,000). Half-yearly payment for self-employed professionals. Rates are prescribed under the Tamil Nadu Tax on Professions, Trades, Callings and Employments Act, 1992.

faqs.q: Is professional tax registration mandatory for all employers in Chennai?
faqs.a: Yes. Every employer in Tamil Nadu with salaried employees must obtain PTEC (enrollment) and PTRC (registration for TDS) and deduct professional tax from employee salaries. Failure to register and deduct attracts penalties.

faqs.q: Can Virtual Auditor handle PT along with payroll processing?
faqs.a: Yes. We integrate professional tax computation and deduction with our payroll processing service. PT is computed based on applicable slabs, deducted from salary, deposited, and reported — all as part of the monthly payroll cycle.
